span.p:
_build_plan_from_path()

For each hop, inspects filter lambdas:
• Edge filter has predicates? → return None
• Intermediate node filter has predicates? → return None
• Last hop node predicate? → OK, becomes post_filter
• No type filters anywhere? → return None

span.p: return None\n→ runtime falls back to legacy edge-walk

use_ordered?

post_filter is None
AND
(has slice OR single-hop)

span.p:
Final hop:
resolve_chain_ordered(origins, edge, node, dir, slc)

BUCKETS build allow-sets
ADJ_LIST walk for insertion order
Slice applied directly

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Prefix hops:
resolve_chain(origin, chain[:-1])

Uses BUCKETS
No bail_on_foreign ⚠️
No cross_root_resolve ⚠️
